text.title: MCP Server Build Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure from tool brief to a paste-ready Claude Code registration.

section.title: Procedure
section.p: Each step has an input, an action, an output, and a decision gate. Do not advance past a gate that fails.
section.code:
STEP 1 — Tool brief intake input: text or YAML list of {name, description, inputs, handler} action: normalize names (snake_case, prefix with server), trim descriptions to ≤512 chars, fail if any inputs use polymorphism output: normalized tool list gate: reject if <1 tool OR description <16 chars OR name not unique
STEP 2 — Transport choice input: deployment plan (clients, location, auth posture, latency) action: run content/06-decision-tree.xml output: transport = stdio | streamable-http gate: if streamable-http, auth.mode != none
STEP 3 — JSON Schema design input: normalized tool list action: for each tool, write a flat inputSchema (type=object, explicit `required`, primitive properties only); add field descriptions output: tools[*].inputSchema gate: `grep -E 'oneOf|anyOf|\\$ref' schemas/` returns nothing
STEP 4 — Handler scaffold input: tool list + chosen transport action: instantiate templates/python-server-stdio.py OR templates/python-server-streamable-http.py; bind handlers; add `ping` tool that returns {status, version}; wrap every handler in the structured error envelope from rule r7 output: server.py gate: server.py imports cleanly; `python -c "import server"` exits 0
STEP 5 — Smoke test with mcp-inspector input: server.py action: `npx @modelcontextprotocol/inspector python server.py` ; call ping; call one domain tool with a fixture input output: inspector trace gate: ping returns {status:"ok"} AND domain tool returns within 2 s AND inputSchema renders flat in inspector UI
STEP 6 — Client registration input: server name, transport, command/url action: emit settings.json snippet (Claude Code `mcpServers` block); for streamable-http, include `url` and bearer header source output: registration.json (paste-ready) gate: `scripts/validate-model-context-protocol.py manifest.json` exits 0

section.title: Inputs and outputs at a glance

list.item: STEP 1 in: tool brief → out: normalized tool list
STEP 2 in: deployment plan → out: transport choice
STEP 3 in: tool list → out: tools[*].inputSchema (flat)
STEP 4 in: list + transport → out: server.py
STEP 5 in: server.py → out: green inspector trace
STEP 6 in: trace + transport → out: paste-ready registration block
